title: Simplify Block Model
description: As the title, an ugly way to improve FPS without mod (100% work)
body:
Based on: [Qwuiblington's FPS Optimized Block Model Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/qwuiblingtons-fps-block-model-pack).

Special thanks to Qwuiblington for making the original texture pack.
***

Unlike other resource packs say "lAg rEdUcE" which actually just reduce the resolution of textures (it actually, may work, but not too efficent), this texture pack (or resource pack, yah whatever you want to call it) simplify the model of some blocks.

By reducing the number of cubes and faces, it can boost the FPS aroung 3% to 300%, yah of course, it's depended what are you looking at.

Although this Qwuiblington's texture pack have 2 versions: Simplified and Ultra Simplified, I only use the Simplified ver. to make this RSP (Ultra Simplified is really, very ugly. I dont recommend you to use it unless you have no other choices).

I try to make the RSP compatible with any other one (same as the orginal), but there is still 2 think cant be done without custom texture: The big dripleaf fix (from [
Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)) and the sea pickle texture (from orignal RSP). Except those, you can use this one with any other texture pack (almost, unless they also change block model).

For more details, plz watch the original explain video from Qwuiblington: [Fixing Block Lag with Better (worse) Models - FPS Pack Explained [1.8–1.18]](https://youtu.be/i4Py99nWsaY).

Note: The pack_format is 15 for 1.20+, but it can run in lower version without any problem (perhap :V).

If anything goes wrong, plz tell me on Issue tracker.
